title: Autoscale the DNS Service in a Cluster — Determine whether DNS horizontal autoscaling is already enabled
text:
List the
Deployments
in your cluster in the kube-system
namespace
:
kubectl get deployment --namespace
=
kube-system
The output is similar to this:
NAME                   READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE
...
kube-dns-autoscaler    1/1     1            1           ...
...
If you see "kube-dns-autoscaler" in the output, DNS horizontal autoscaling is
already enabled, and you can skip to
Tuning autoscaling parameters
.
